news.title:
Jefferies reiterates Buy on Bharat Forge, sets target price Rs 2,150 citing defense expansion.
Growth supported by US truck order rebound, US industrial activity, and govt procurement focus.
news.summary:
Jefferies reiterates Buy on Bharat Forge, sets target price Rs 2,150 citing defense expansion.
Growth supported by US truck order rebound, US industrial activity, and govt procurement focus.

news.title:
JS Auto received Rs. 300 crore investment from PI Opportunities Fund.
JS Auto becomes step-down subsidiary of Bharat Forge after 23% stake acquisition.
news.summary:
JS Auto received Rs. 300 crore investment from PI Opportunities Fund.
JS Auto becomes step-down subsidiary of Bharat Forge after 23% stake acquisition.

news.title:
Nifty Auto index faces worst week in six years, down 10% amid risks.
Ashok Leyland, Bharat Forge, Tata Motors PV, TVS Motor decline over 10%.

news.title:
Bharat Forge Ltd invested Rs. 1600.4M in Bharat Forge Global Holding GmbH.
Investment supports overseas manufacturing projects in Germany.
news.summary:
Bharat Forge Ltd invested Rs. 1600.4M in Bharat Forge Global Holding GmbH.

news.title:
Bharat Forge opens high-tech landing gear facility in Pune with Liebherr-Aerospace.
The facility aims to boost India's aerospace manufacturing and supply chain position.
news.summary:
Bharat Forge opens high-tech landing gear facility in Pune with Liebherr-Aerospace.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed Bharat Forge's credit ratings, maintaining AA Stable and A1 for various facilities.
Non-convertible debentures rated Rs.125 Cr reaffirmed; Rs.700 Cr withdrawn.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed Bharat Forge's credit ratings, maintaining AA Stable and A1 for various facilities.
Non-convertible debentures rated Rs.125 Cr reaffirmed; Rs.700 Cr withdrawn.

news.title:
Bharat Forge hit ₹1935.5 all-time high, up 24% in 2026, driven by CV upcycle, tariff cuts.
US tariff cut boosts exports; Nomura forecasts FY28 EBITDA at ₹4541 cr, stock near target ₹1844.
news.summary:
Bharat Forge hit ₹1935.5 all-time high, up 24% in 2026, driven by CV upcycle, tariff cuts.
US tariff cut boosts exports; Nomura forecasts FY28 EBITDA at ₹4541 cr, stock near target ₹1844.

news.title:
Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai platform, boosting automotive software; stock rises 2% to ₹4,490.
GRSE & Bharat Forge sign MoU for defence manufacturing; GRSE stock jumps 6% to ₹2,548 on NSE.
news.summary:
Tata Elxsi launches DevStudio.ai platform, boosting automotive software; stock rises 2% to ₹4,490.
GRSE & Bharat Forge sign MoU for defence manufacturing; GRSE stock jumps 6% to ₹2,548 on NSE.

news.title: Bharat Forge rises as U.S. truck orders surge, hinting at CV cycle recovery.
news.summary: Bharat Forge rises as U.S. truck orders surge, hinting at CV cycle recovery.

news.title:
Bharat Forge shares gain focus as North American Class 8 truck orders surged 159% YoY in February, totaling 47,200 units.
The stock has risen 25.5% YTD, with export growth in commercial/industrial segments driving optimism amid freight market recovery.
news.summary:
Bharat Forge shares gain focus as North American Class 8 truck orders surged 159% YoY in February, totaling 47,200 units.
The stock has risen 25.5% YTD, with export growth in commercial/industrial segments driving optimism amid freight market recovery.

news.title:
Bharat Forge's board approved raising up to Rs. 20,000M via various debt means.
Investment Committee approved Rs. 8,000M unsecured rupee term loan for operations or growth.
news.summary:
Bharat Forge's board approved raising up to Rs. 20,000M via various debt means.
Investment Committee approved Rs. 8,000M unsecured rupee term loan for operations or growth.

Key semiconductor chip unit also cleared in HLCA meeting chaired by CM.

Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
